Authorized Lions Floor Installer · Phoenix Metro

Lions Floor at Surprise Granite

SPC, luxury vinyl plank, WPC, laminate, and loose-lay flooring — installed across the Phoenix metro from our Surprise fabrication shop. Lions Floor's full product line: Bambino, BevelMark, Grande, District, Lone Star Spirit, Canyon Coast, and more. By appointment, in your home. AZ ROC #341113.

Free In-Home Estimate Call (602) 833-3189
Lions Floor Product Lines

Five Categories, Twenty Product Lines

Lions Floor manufactures rigid-core SPC, flexible LVP, water-resistant WPC, traditional laminate, and loose-lay vinyl in a full range of finishes for residential and commercial projects. We install all five categories across Phoenix metro homes.

SPC — Stone Polymer Composite

Rigid core. 100% waterproof. Highest dent resistance of any vinyl-format flooring. Best for high-traffic Phoenix homes, kitchens, baths, and slab-on-grade installations where moisture is a concern.

BambinoBevelMarkGrandeIndoor DelightLions ReservationLone Star SpiritLone Star Spirit XLNatural Essence PlusTrentaVersa

LVP — Luxury Vinyl Plank

Flexible vinyl. Waterproof. Softer underfoot than SPC. Broad design range — wood-look, stone-look, herringbone. Sweet spot for bedrooms, living rooms, and full-house installs where comfort and price matter.

DistrictDistrict ProDistrict Max

WPC — Wood Polymer Composite

Wood-fiber core. Warmer underfoot. Excellent acoustic properties. Best for living spaces where you want the resilience of vinyl with a more wood-like feel.

Canyon CoastSeaside SummitOcean Crest

Laminate

Traditional laminate construction with high-pressure photographic decor layer. Most cost-effective for low-moisture rooms. Comfort Heights and Haven Heights deliver on durability for the price point.

Comfort HeightsHaven Heights

Loose Lay

Friction-backed vinyl that lays flat without glue or click-lock. Fast install, easy replacement of single planks if damaged. Formalay is our recommendation for landlords and quick-turn flips.

Formalay

Multifamily & Builder

Lions Floor offers builder and multifamily programs with bulk pricing, designer-curated palette packages, and warranty support tailored to property management. We're set up to deliver on builder schedules and multi-unit rollouts.

Contact us for builder pricing
Why Lions Floor for Arizona

Built for Phoenix-Metro Homes

Arizona kitchens hit 110°F surface temperatures in summer; monsoon humidity spikes; slab-on-grade floors run cooler than the air. Flooring choices that survive these swings are a different conversation than what works in coastal climates.

Heat & UV Stability

SPC and WPC product lines hold dimensional stability across Phoenix's 30°F daily summer temperature swings. UV-stable surface layers prevent the bleaching that plagues lower-grade LVP near west and south Arizona windows.

Monsoon-Season Waterproofing

SPC and LVP are 100% waterproof — important for Phoenix kitchens, laundry rooms, and bathrooms. Even an hour-long monsoon power outage with the AC off doesn't move dimensions on a properly-installed Lions Floor SPC plank.

Slab-on-Grade Compatibility

Most Phoenix-area homes are slab-on-grade construction. Lions Floor SPC and LVP install directly over concrete with vapor barriers where required, tolerating the residual slab moisture common in Arizona homes built over caliche soil.

Pet, Pool, & Indoor-Outdoor Wear

Phoenix homes get heavy pool-area traffic, dog-claw wear, and indoor-outdoor lifestyle abuse. Lions Floor SPC's commercial-grade wear layer handles all three. We've installed in homes with golden retrievers, pool-and-spa walk-in patterns, and 4 kids — without complaint.

How We Install

From In-Home Estimate to Finished Floor

Same crew, same fabrication shop, same fixed pricing across our 50-mile Phoenix metro service radius. Standard Lions Floor install timeline is 2–3 days for a 1,000 sq ft home.

1

In-Home Estimate

We come to your home with Lions Floor sample boards. Walk every room. Laser-measure. Quote in writing on the spot — no shop visit required.

2

Subfloor Assessment

Phoenix slabs are rarely level. We check moisture, flatness, and joint conditions during the estimate so the quote includes any prep — no surprise add-ons mid-install.

3

Acclimation & Delivery

Lions Floor product is delivered to your home 48 hours before install for acclimation. Climate stabilizes the planks to your specific room temperature and humidity.

4

Installation

2–3 days for typical 1,000 sq ft home. Sequenced room-by-room so you can stay in the house. Includes underlayment, transitions, baseboard reset, and quarter-round.

5

Walkthrough & Warranty

Final walkthrough, warranty registration with Lions Floor, and care-and-maintenance handoff. We're 30 minutes away if anything ever needs attention.

Common Questions

Lions Floor FAQs

What Lions Floor product lines does Surprise Granite carry?
All major Lions Floor product lines including Bambino, BevelMark, Grande, Indoor Delight, Lions Reservation, Lone Star Spirit and Lone Star Spirit XL, Natural Essence Plus, Trenta, Versa, District LVP (with Pro and Max variants), Comfort Heights and Haven Heights laminate, Canyon Coast / Seaside Summit / Ocean Crest WPC, and Formalay loose-lay. Quote during the in-home estimate.
How much does Lions Floor SPC cost installed in Phoenix?
Lions Floor SPC and LVP installed runs $5–$9 per sq ft for residential, depending on product line and subfloor condition. WPC and premium laminate run $6–$10 installed. Includes subfloor prep, vapor barrier where required, transitions, and trim. We quote in writing after in-home measure.
Is Lions Floor good for Arizona's heat and monsoon humidity?
Yes — SPC and WPC product lines are 100% waterproof and dimensionally stable across the temperature swings Arizona kitchens, baths, and laundry rooms see. Lions Floor SPC handles the 110°F+ surface temperatures common in Phoenix monsoon-season rooms with direct sun. Laminate is more sensitive to humidity; we recommend SPC for any room near plumbing or AZ slab-on-grade installations with potential moisture.
Do you install over existing Phoenix-area tile or hardwood?
Often, yes. Lions Floor SPC, LVP, and WPC float over most level subfloors including existing tile, hardwood, vinyl, and concrete. We assess subfloor flatness during the in-home estimate — out-of-level Phoenix slabs (common in 1970s+ homes) may need a self-leveling pour first. Tile demo is available if you prefer to start clean.
How long does Lions Floor installation take?
Typical installation timing for an average Phoenix-metro home: 1,000 sq ft completes in 2–3 days, including subfloor prep and trim. Larger homes or homes requiring slab leveling add 1–2 days. We can install in occupied homes by sequencing rooms; you don't have to move out.
What's the difference between SPC, LVP, and WPC for Arizona homes?
SPC (Stone Polymer Composite) — rigid core, 100% waterproof, hardest of the three, best for high-traffic and unstable subfloors. LVP (Luxury Vinyl Plank) — flexible vinyl, waterproof, comfortable underfoot, broadest design range. WPC (Wood Polymer Composite) — wood-fiber core, softer feel, warmer underfoot, water-resistant. For most Phoenix homes we recommend SPC; for bedrooms or living rooms where comfort matters, WPC; for budget projects, standard LVP.
Do you handle warranty claims with Lions Floor?
Yes. As an authorized Lions Floor installer we handle warranty registration and any future warranty claims directly with the manufacturer. Most Lions Floor product lines carry residential lifetime warranties on the structural integrity of the floor and 10-year+ commercial warranties; specifics vary by product line and are documented on the product spec sheet we provide with your install.

Free In-Home Lions Floor Estimate

Sample boards, finish chips, laser measure. We come to your Phoenix-metro home and quote on the spot. By appointment only — no walk-in showroom.
